title: Cook, steam and cool product
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Cook, steam and cool product demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Place product in cooking or steaming facility

pcs.text: Identify individual product and place correctly in cooking or steaming facility for even cooking or steaming
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify individual product and place correctly in cooking or steaming facility for even cooking or steaming?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify individual product and place correctly in cooking or steaming facility for even cooking or steaming.

pcs.text: Space product in cooking facility according to product and manufacturer's specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Space product in cooking facility according to product and manufacturer's specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Space product in cooking facility according to product and manufacturer's specifications.

elements.title: Cook or steam product

pcs.text: Set and maintain cooking or steaming cycle according to specifications and workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set and maintain cooking or steaming cycle according to specifications and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Regularly monitor cooking or steaming process and adjust as necessary to fulfil product specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Regularly monitor cooking or steaming process and adjust as necessary to fulfil product specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Regularly monitor cooking or steaming process and adjust as necessary to fulfil product specifications.

pcs.text: Check internal temperature of product on completion of cooking or steaming cycle to ensure correct process has been achieved

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check internal temperature of product on completion of cooking or steaming cycle to ensure correct process has been achieved.

pcs.text: Cook or steam a variety of products to workplace requirements and customer specifications at a speed similar to production requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cook or steam a variety of products to workplace requirements and customer specifications at a speed similar to production requirements.

pcs.text: Correctly record process and results of cooking or steaming
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correctly record process and results of cooking or steaming?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correctly record process and results of cooking or steaming.

pcs.text: Dye product to achieve a uniform colour when required by product specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dye product to achieve a uniform colour when required by product specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dye product to achieve a uniform colour when required by product specifications.

elements.title: Chill or cool product

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh product immediately on completion of cooking or steaming cycle.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Chill product immediately or cool at ambient temperature before chilling according to product specifications.

pcs.text: Identify and store product according to product specifications and workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and store product according to product specifications and workplace requirements.
